package server

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/binary"
	"fmt"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
	"testing"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

	"github.com/ollama/ollama/api"
	"github.com/ollama/ollama/manifest"
)

// TestCreateHandlerSafetensorsMaxInt64Panic verifies that POST /api/create
// with a crafted safetensors blob triggers an uncaught panic in the detached
// goroutine, which would crash the Ollama process.
func TestCreateHandlerSafetensorsMaxInt64Panic(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)
	p := t.TempDir()
	t.Setenv("OLLAMA_MODELS", p)

	// Create blobs dir
	_ = filepath.Join(p, "blobs")

	makeBlob := func(content []byte) string {
		l, err := manifest.NewLayer(bytes.NewReader(content), "application/octet-stream")
		if err != nil {
			t.Fatalf("NewLayer: %v", err)
		}
		return l.Digest
	}

	// Safetensors blob with MaxInt64 header length.
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	var n int64 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
	binary.Write(&buf, binary.LittleEndian, n)
	modelDigest := makeBlob(buf.Bytes())

	configDigest := makeBlob([]byte(`{"architectures":["LlamaForCausalLM"],"vocab_size":32000}`))
	tokDigest := makeBlob([]byte(`{"version":"1.0"}`))

	var s Server

	// Run CreateHandler synchronously by calling convertFromSafetensors directly
	// since the actual panic would happen in the detached goroutine anyway.
	files := map[string]string{
		"model.safetensors": modelDigest,
		"config.json":       configDigest,
		"tokenizer.json":    tokDigest,
	}

	ch := make(chan any)
	go func() {
		defer close(ch)
		// This mirrors the CreateHandler goroutine at create.go:99 - NO recover()
		_, err := convertFromSafetensors(files, nil, false, func(resp api.ProgressResponse) {})
		if err != nil {
			ch <- err.Error()
		}
	}()

	// Collect output, or detect panic via process behavior
	var lines []string
	done := false
	for !done {
		select {
		case msg, ok := <-ch:
			if !ok {
				done = true
				break
			}
			lines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf("%v", msg))
		}
	}
	fmt.Println("server_test output:", strings.Join(lines, "\n"))

	_ = s
}
